products.description: MCP server: code graph + memory + knowledge in one binary. 23 tools across 3 domains. Stores injected edges that grep never sees.

install.instructions: Download the latest wicked-estate binary from https://github.com/mikeparcewski/wicked-estate/releases and add it to your PATH. Then add it as an MCP server in your CLI config.

products.description: Local-first SQLite event bus. At-least-once delivery, poll-based, no network transport. Decouples agents and tools without external infrastructure.
47-skill QE pipeline with 3-agent acceptance testing. Enforces separation between the agent that runs tests and the agent that evaluates them. Eliminates self-grading.
Digital brain + Claude Code skills adapter. SQLite-backed. Indexes codebase knowledge, surfaces context before work sessions.

Curated toolkit for what coding agents can't do alone: re-derives 'done' from evidence, sees injected edges, renames across files as a graph operation, multi-model review. Opinionated bundle — all or nothing.

install.instructions: wicked-garden is not yet published to npm. Clone https://github.com/mikeparcewski/wicked-garden and follow the README install instructions.

products.note: Opinionated bundle — you get everything. Individual components cannot be disabled.

products.description: Text-in / intent-out classifier. Receives Slack threads, alerts, file changes, user requests — classifies and routes each to the right handler with confidence.

install.instructions: wicked-signals is in design phase and not yet available for installation.

bundles.description: Just wicked-testing — the fastest way to add acceptance testing to your AI workflow. Standalone, no dependencies.
The recommended starting point. Bus + Garden + Testing gives you evidence-gated work, event coupling, and a full QE pipeline.
Estate + Brain + Bus — the persistent memory and code-graph layer everything else can query.
Everything stable — bus, estate, brain, garden, testing. The complete wicked-* experience.
